Drifloon: Canadian Weather Data Download Toolkit

Drifloon.Rd

Downloads Canadian weather station data.

Main Functions

  • download_station_month(): Download one month of hourly data for a station.

  • download_station_by_name(): Primary user entry for station downloads.

  • download_station_province(): Download all stations in a province.

  • download_all_station(): Download all stations in metadata.

  • load_metadata(): Load packaged station metadata.

  • sync_metadata(): Sync metadata from official station inventory.

  • download_metadata(): Copy packaged metadata .rds file to disk.

See also

Useful links:

  • Environment and Climate Change Canada climate data portal: https://climate.weather.gc.ca/

Author

Maintainer: Joey Frost-Xenopoulos joeyfrostxenopoulos@trentu.ca
